Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B2FKAISI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10069 0 0}I sense the target two blocks ahead of you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10070 0 0}It seems to be moving slowly downward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B3FKAISI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10073 0 0}It seems it was some kind of armory during the war.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10074 0 0}I've never seen so many weapons lying around before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10075 0 0}They were all designed to kill people...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10076 0 0}Having to kill others to survive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10077 0 0}It's hard to believe a time like that is part of our history.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B4FKAISI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10078 0 0}The target's gaining speed! It's continuing down the tunnel![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B5FKAISI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10081 0 0}It turned around! It's waiting for us one block down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B1FNOTFUL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}It's too dangerous to go without more people![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_TOBIRA_HAZIKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door's too heavy to open.[n]I think we're trapped...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2FLU_BED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...That skeleton used to be somebody.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2FRU_COBWEB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are cobwebs[n]stretching over the boxes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2FLD_CAMPIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like canned food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2FRD_DESK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tables and boxes clutter the room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2F_SKELETON_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a diary next to the skeleton's hand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_B2F_SKELETON_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"We have toiled until our fingers bled in hopes of protecting our country... protecting my family..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"We've failed."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"But while the temptation to succumb to despair is strong, we cannot afford that luxury."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"The sky may boil crimson, but we shall persevere."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2F_SENSYAPART
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Stacks of heavy artillery are stored here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2F_TAIHOU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a huge, wheeled cannon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B2F_CYLINDER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}These weapon parts look complicated...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B3F_WHEEL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Some kind of large disk is resting here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B3F_SKELETON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a skeleton crushed[n]under the machinery...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B3F_SKELETON2_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A diary with a desiccated lock[n]is lying near the skeleton.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_B3F_SKELETON2_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"In the hopes that this message will reach my loved ones, I have sealed this journal for its protection."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"We few survivors have ensured the completion of our goal."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"So many of our cohorts will never know our success... I pray their spirits find rest in the wake of this turmoil."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"To my mother, my wife, and my children: please do not think that I have abandoned you."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"If securing your futures means giving my life, then I will have done so happily. Honor my memory by living."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B21F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10074 0 0}I've never seen so many weapons lying around before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10075 0 0}They were all designed to kill people...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B21F_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10076 0 0}Having to kill others to survive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10077 0 0}It's hard to believe a time like that is part of our history.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B21F_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10073 0 0}It seems it was some kind of armory during the war.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_SANADA_B21F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20665 0 0}These tracks on the ground seem to be made recently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_JUNPEI_B21F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20664 0 0}Huh? Why the hell are there tread marks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_MITSURU_B21F_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4067 0 0}These might belong to our target... Let's keep an eye out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_MITSURU_B21F_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4067 0 0}These could belong to the target... Stay alert, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ML_MEDAL_GET_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What's that on the ground...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ML_MEDAL_GOT_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I haven't seen anything like this before...[n]I should hold onto it for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_ML_MEDAL_GET_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Something's on the desk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DUNGE_B3F_SKELETON2_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...What are all these documents?[n]{f 1 1}
